name: lindenmayer

en.when_to_use: Use it to teach L-systems, fractals, or procedural growth (ferns, trees, Koch curves, Penrose tilings): provide an axiom and productions, let it iterate the rewritten string, then render with a few lines of turtle graphics. Do not use it for fixed geometry or systems not based on rewriting.
en.why_valuable: This L-system rewriting engine supports context-sensitive, stochastic (weighted), and parametric productions. AI will make mistakes deriving many rewriting generations by hand; it reliably expands an axiom and rules into the correct turtle-command sequence.

data_in.note: LSystem is the default export. Production values may be strings, weighted stochastic objects, or functions. Use classic <> syntax for context sensitivity and [ ] for branches.

schema.axiom: string -- initial axiom, such as 'F++F++F' (parametric L-systems may also pass object arrays)
schema.productions: { [symbol:string]: string | object | function } -- rewriting rules, such as { 'F': 'F-F++F-F' }
schema.iterations?: number -- number of generations passed to iterate(n); supplied by the consumer, for example 4
schema.finals?: { [symbol:string]: function } -- optional drawing functions executed per symbol by final()

when_to_use: 教 L-system/分形/程序化生长(蕨、树、Koch 曲线、Penrose 铺砖)时用:给公理+产生式,它迭代出重写串,你接几行海龟绘图渲染。固定几何图形或非重写系统不用它。
why_valuable: 支持上下文敏感/随机(加权)/参数化产生式的 L-system 重写引擎;AI 徒手推导多代重写串必错,它把『公理+规则』稳定展开成正确的海龟指令序列。

data_in.note: LSystem 是 default 导出。productions 值可为 字符串 / 加权随机对象 / 函数;上下文敏感用经典 <> 语法,分支用 [ ]。

schema.axiom: string —— 初始公理,如 'F++F++F'(参数化 L-system 也可传对象数组)
schema.productions: { [symbol:string]: string | object | function } —— 重写规则,如 { 'F': 'F-F++F-F' }
schema.iterations?: number —— iterate(n) 的代数,默认由消费方给(如 4)
schema.finals?: { [symbol:string]: function } —— final() 时逐符号执行的绘图函数(可选)

provides._note: headless-primitive:引擎产字符串,无渲染;符号→海龟绘图交消费 AI。
provides.outputs: 迭代 n 代后的重写字符串(公理展开),以及可选 finals() 逐符号绘图回调用于海龟解释。

api_surface.ctor: new LSystem({ axiom, productions, finals?, branchSymbols?, ignoredSymbols? })
api_surface.run: ls.iterate(n) → 最终字符串;ls.getString() 取当前串;ls.final() 执行 finals 绘图回调

peer.note: p5 提供 canvas/海龟绘图,把 iterate() 出的串解释成分形/植物图形(F 前进、+/- 转角、[ ] 分支入/出栈)。

boot.note: default 导出(import LSystem from …,不是命名导出)。引擎只产重写字符串;把符号解释为海龟绘图是消费 AI 的事,画进自建 canvas(定高 px 禁 vh)。productions 支持 字符串/加权随机对象/函数,上下文敏感用经典 <> 语法。

isolation.evidence: API correct: +esm export is default-only (export{g as default}) → import LSystem from 'lindenmayer' (react-pdf-renderer style default-namespace import). README confirms new LSystem({axiom, productions[, finals]}); iterate(n) returns the expanded string; getString(); final() runs finals draw callbacks; productions accept String|Object|Function; classic context-sensitive <> and branch [] syntax. Pure string-rewriting engine: no DOM, no stylesheet, no events → shadow-safe; turtle rendering is the consumer's own canvas code.
